---
title: "Talks & Lectures"
listing: 
  - id: conferences
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/research/conferences.yml
    template-params:
      type: conference
      lang: en
  - id: seminars
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/research/seminars.yml
    template-params:
      type: seminar
      lang: en
description: |
  List of my talks from 2017.  
---

## Conferences
::: {#conferences}
:::

## Seminars
::: {#seminars}
:::
